title: Gorak (disambiguation)
content:
'''Gorak''' can refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Gorak Palas]], an underboss of the [[Pyke Syndicate]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*[[Gorak (creature)|Gorak]], a bird species
*[[Gorak (Trandoshan)|Gorak]], a Trandoshan slave
*[[Gorak Khzam]], a Rodian slaver and soldier

{{Disambig}}
